# Q7 integer divide (truncating) per-row out/in (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q7 integer divide (truncating) per-row out/in.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | filter bytes_in > 0 | alter ratio_int = divide(bytes_out, bytes_in) | sort desc ratio_int | fields host, dst, bytes_out, bytes_in, ratio_int
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
